# SimpleNDT

> Independent NDT Level 3 consulting firm based in São Paulo, Brazil. Founded by Dan Yamashita — Naval Engineer, MSc Mechatronics (Ultrasound), International Welding Engineer (IWE), ASNT NDT Level III, and PCN Level 3 (ISO 9712) in VT, PT, MT, UT, and RT. PCN Level 2 in PAUT. 13+ years in nondestructive testing for pressure equipment, energy, wind, and naval sectors.

SimpleNDT provides Level 3 NDT consulting for manufacturers holding ASME stamps, companies requiring PED 2014/68/EU compliance (CE marking) with Level 3 personnel approved by a Recognized Third-Party Organization (RTPO), and organizations needing SNT-TC-1A personnel qualification. Dan Yamashita holds dual certification (ASNT + PCN), enabling simultaneous compliance with American (ASME, AWS, API) and European (PED, EN ISO) requirements.

## Services

- [NDT Procedures](https://www.simplendt.com.br/servicos/procedimentos.html): Development and qualification of NDT procedures per ASME Section V, AWS D1.1, API 1104, and EN ISO standards. All methods: RT, UT, PAUT, MT, PT, VT.
- [Personnel Qualification SNT-TC-1A](https://www.simplendt.com.br/servicos/qualificacoes.html): Qualification and certification of NDT inspectors Level 1 and 2 per SNT-TC-1A. General, specific, and practical examinations. Written Practice development.
- [ASME Stamp Audits](https://www.simplendt.com.br/servicos/auditorias-asme.html): Preparation and support for triennial ASME stamp recertification audits. Procedure review, personnel qualification, Authorized Inspector accompaniment. Stamps: U, U2, S, R, PP.
- [PED/RTPO Compliance](https://www.simplendt.com.br/servicos/ped.html): Level 3 PCN (ISO 9712) approved under RTPO scheme for PED 2014/68/EU. Inspections as Level 2 PCN for CE marking of pressure equipment. WPS qualification (ISO 15614-1) and welder qualification (ISO 9606-1). Note: SNT-TC-1A and SNQC (ABENDI) certifications are not accepted for PED categories III and IV — RTPO or Notified Body approval under ISO 9712 is required.
- [Phased Array PAUT](https://www.simplendt.com.br/servicos/phased-array.html): Phased Array procedures per ASME Section V Article 4 Mandatory Appendix XII, scan plans, field inspections, and personnel qualification. PCN and SNT-TC-1A Level 2 in PAUT.
- [NDT Training](https://www.simplendt.com.br/servicos/treinamento.html): In-company training for NDT Level 1 and 2 inspectors per SNT-TC-1A. Six methods: VT, PT, MT, UT, RT, PAUT. Customized to client scope, equipment, and applicable codes.

## Blog

- [SNT-TC-1A: Complete Guide to ASNT Qualification and Certification](https://www.simplendt.com.br/blog/snt-tc-1a-guia-completo.html): What SNT-TC-1A is, employer-based certification, personnel levels, training requirements, examinations, recertification, and FAQ.
- [Phased Array vs Radiography under ASME](https://www.simplendt.com.br/blog/phased-array-substituicao-radiografia-asme.html): When ASME Section V permits phased array UT as alternative to radiography: code requirements, cost-benefit analysis, and implementation guidance.
- [ASME Stamp Certification NDE Requirements](https://www.simplendt.com.br/blog/selo-asme-requisitos-end-auditorias.html): ASME stamp certification NDE requirements: what the Authorized Inspector verifies, common nonconformities, and audit preparation checklist.

## About

- [Dan Yamashita](https://www.simplendt.com.br/sobre.html): Naval Engineer (Poli-USP), MSc Mechatronics with ultrasound research, IWE. ASNT NDT Level III (VT, RT, UT, MT, PT). PCN Level 3 ISO 9712 (VT, RT, UT, MT, PT). PCN Level 2 ISO 9712 (VT, RT, UT, MT, PT, PAUT). SNT-TC-1A qualified in PAUT. Active in NDT since 2012.
- [Certifications](https://www.simplendt.com.br/certificacoes.html): Full list of certifications with issuing bodies and methods.
- [Contact](https://www.simplendt.com.br/contato.html): contato@simplendt.com.br | WhatsApp: +55 11 99161-2503 | LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/danyamashita

## English Version

- [SimpleNDT in English](https://www.simplendt.com.br/en/): Full bilingual site (PT-BR and EN).

## Key Technical Distinctions

- RTPO (Recognized Third-Party Organization) is an organization recognized by an EU Member State to approve NDT personnel under PED, not a person or role.
- SNT-TC-1A certification is employer-based and not accepted for PED categories III/IV. ISO 9712 certification by an RTPO or Notified Body is required.
- SNQC (ABENDI, Brazil) follows ISO 9712 but is not an RTPO recognized by any EU Member State, so SNQC certification alone does not satisfy PED requirements for categories III/IV.
- SimpleNDT holds both ASNT and PCN certifications, uniquely covering both American and European code requirements with a single consultant.
- PCN certificate number 340677 — verifiable at bindt.org.
- PED 2014/68/EU RTPO approval via LRQA-CASL (Approved Body).
